text: "To stay."... His desiring them to stay, after he had been fully informed already that it was not God’s will he should go, came from the inclination he had to gratify Balac for the sake of worldly gain. And this perverse disposition God punished by permitting him to go, (though not to curse the people, as he would willingly have done,) and suffering him to fall still deeper and deeper into sin, till he came at last to give that abominable counsel against the people of God, which ended in his own destruction. So sad a thing it is to indulge a passion for money.
"Opened the mouth"... The angel moved the tongue of the ass to utter these speeches, to rebuke, by the mouth of a brute beast, the brutal fury and folly of Balaam.
"Perverse"... Because thy inclinations are wicked in being willing for the sake of gain to curse the people of whom I am the guardian.
